ModMetaData.name: Ayameduki Races Combat Extended Patch
ModMetaData.author: Zades
ModMetaData.description:
Patches Ayameduki Races for Combat Extended.
Recent update highlights: - Expanded Outerm Race support with CE ammo, projectiles, weapons, apparel, materials, hediff, body, summon, and race patches. - Includes code-side compatibility for special Ayameduki behaviors such as Idhale EX handling and Outerm growing weapons under CE melee.
